assertionResults.reason: Initial workspace load used consolidated bootstrap fetching: Performance Resource Timing shows exactly 2 API resource entries (1x /api/workspace/bootstrap and 1x /api/health/ai) with 0 channel snapshot requests, satisfying the 1-2 initial workspace request expectation and eliminating 3+ per-channel snapshot fetches.

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` returned no entries right after first navigation, and reload capture included duplicated health/SSE lines.
frictions.resolution: Used Performance Resource Timing extraction as primary evidence for initial request counting and kept network logs as supplemental evidence.
